Type Alias# FFProperty

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
typealias FFProperty = UInt32
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffproperty#Discussion)

Used for **FFDeviceGetForceFeedbackProperty()** and **FFDeviceSetForceFeedbackProperty()**.
